text:
The Markets tab crash after the last update, still happening post-reinstall on your iPhone 14 (iOS 26.4), points to something in that release rather than your device setup. Can you send the exact app build number (Settings > About or the App Store listing) and, if you get one, the exact error message or screen you see right before it crashes?

That will let us loop in engineering with the specifics needed to track it down. They'll follow up once there's an update.

Novig Support
